meaning: n.汉普郡(英国南部之一郡)
examples: Hampshire College does not grade the students' work.
They are in New Hampshire to commentate on the ice hockey.
He is now working freelance from his home in New Hampshire.
And these two states will be the second and third states after Iowa and New Hampshire.
Patrica Racette was born in Manchester, New Hampshire, and won the Richard Tucker Award in 1998.
